summary: Tested QuickStats bar feature addition on NIA page. All 12 features verified successfully: QuickStats bar renders with data-testid='quick-stats-bar', 6 individual stat cards render (collections, backtests, promotions, data, ai, health), AI stat shows '53.9%' accuracy after data loads, Health stat shows '2/7' connectors after data loads, Intel Overview cards show populated data (AI Accuracy 53.9%, Strategies Live 0, Learning Health 'Critical', Calibrations Today 0), Connector health dots visible showing '2/7 connectors', QuickStats color coding works (cyan for AI, yellow for partial health, neutral for inactive), Refresh Intel button triggers data refresh, Data Collection panel tabs (Coverage/Collect/Progress) functional, Testing & Scanning panel tabs (Market Scanner/Advanced Testing) switch correctly, AI Modules & Connectors panel tabs (Performance/Connectors) switch correctly, Strategy Pipeline panel tabs (Lifecycle/Promotions) switch correctly.

console_warnings.issue: React warning: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component

details: Shows 'System idle' indicator when no active jobs
collections: data-testid='quick-stat-collections' - Shows 'Idle' when no pending collections
backtests: data-testid='quick-stat-backtests' - Shows 'None' when no running jobs
promotions: data-testid='quick-stat-promotions' - Shows 'None' when no ready promotions
ai: data-testid='quick-stat-ai' - Shows '53.9%' accuracy after data loads
health: data-testid='quick-stat-health' - Shows '2/7' connectors after data loads
AI stat shows '53.9%' accuracy percentage after data loads
Cyan background color indicates active/trained model
Health stat shows '2/7' connector count after data loads
Yellow background indicates partial health (not all connectors healthy)
Connector health dots visible with data-testid='connector-health-dots'
Refresh Intel button found with data-testid='nia-refresh-btn'
Triggers data refresh and updates QuickStats and Intel Overview
Market Scanner tab: data-testid='testing-tab-scanner' - switches correctly
Advanced Testing tab: data-testid='testing-tab-advanced' - switches correctly

critical_code_review_comments: QuickStatsBar.jsx: Well-structured component with proper memoization and data-testid attributes
index.jsx: Two-phase fetch approach (fast endpoints first, slow endpoints with timeout) is a good pattern for UX
AIModulesPanel.jsx: Array connector handling fix (lines 20-23) correctly normalizes API response
IntelOverview.jsx: Connector health dots properly display with data-testid for testing
Minor React warning about setState during render in DataCacheProvider - low priority, doesn't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: QuickStats bar feature verified. After clicking 'Get Started' on startup modal, navigate to NIA via 2nd sidebar button. Click 'Refresh Intel' and wait 15-20 seconds for data to load. AI accuracy shows '53.9%' and Health shows '2/7' connectors when data loads. All panel tabs (Data Collection, Testing & Scanning, AI Modules, Strategy Pipeline) work correctly.
